title: Surveillance of Japanese encephalitis - Canada.ca
content:
## Surveillance of Japanese encephalitis
Learn about Japanese encephalitis surveillance.
- How many cases of Japanese encephalitis are there?
- For more information

## How many cases of Japanese encephalitis are there?
In 2012, the World Health Organization estimated 67,900 Japanese encephalitis cases annually.
Largely as a result of immunization, the incidence of Japanese encephalitis has been declining in:
- the Republic of Korea
- some regions of China
However, transmission of the virus remains unaffected by immunization, and non-immunized individuals remain at risk.
